title: HTML – Wikipedia
content: HTML – Wikipedia 跳至內容 Wikipedia (chū-iû ê pek-kho-choân-su) beh kā lí kóng... HTML sī Eng-gí HyperText Markup Language ("Chhiau-bûn-pún Phiau-chù Gí-giân") ê kán-lio̍k, sī siat-kè ēng lâi chè-chō bāng-ia̍h ê thêng-sek gí-giân. I ki-pún ê kong-lêng sī lī-ēng piau-chù bûn-kiāⁿ lâi khu-pia̍t jī-chhiá chéng-ha̍p phì-jû bû-jī, tô͘-ôe, liân-kiat, siaⁿ-im kap iáⁿ-phìⁿ téng bô kâng khoán ê mi̍h, hō͘ liû-lám-khì ē-sài jīn chhut bô-kêng hêng-sek ê lōe-iông jî-chhiá sàng chhut-lâi hō͘ sú-iōng-chiá chhau-chok koan-khòaⁿ. Pún bûn-chiuⁿ sī chi̍t phiⁿ phí-á-kiáⁿ. Lí thang tàu khok-chhiong lâi pang-chō͘ Wikipedia.HiánLūnPian Lâi-goân: "https://zh-min-nan.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=HTML&oldid=1523070" Lūi: Tiān-náuWorld Wide WebChhàng khí-lâi ê lūi-pia̍t: Choân-pō͘ phí-á-kiáⁿ bûn-chiuⁿPhí-á-kiáⁿ Chhiau-chhoē HTML 140 chióng gí-giân Ke chi̍t-ê toān-lo̍h
